hero.description: Powerful browser-based image processing tools that work entirely on your device. No uploads, no servers, complete privacy.

story.title: Our Story
story.p1: PixBatch was born from a simple frustration: why should professional-grade image tools require expensive software or risky cloud uploads? We believed there had to be a better way.
story.p2: Founded in 2024, we built a platform where all processing happens directly in your browser using modern web technologies. Your images never leave your device, giving you complete control and privacy. Today, thousands of creators, developers, and businesses trust PixBatch for their image processing needs.

values.title: Our Core Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do
